title: Genome-Wide Association Analysis of Tic Disorders Reveals 6 Independent Risk Loci and Highlights Tic-Associated Cell Types and Brain Circuitry
summary: GWAS of 13,247 tic disorder cases identifies 6 loci including HCN1 (in our 49-gene set). Highlights cortico-striato-thalamo-cortical circuits, D1/D2 MSNs, cortical pyramidal neurons, oligodendrocytes. Extensive genetic correlations with NDD/psychiatric but not neurological disorders. HCN1 prioritized as risk gene.
